question.text: Which of the following statements about the AIF Code of Conduct is TRUE?

answer.text: It applies only to the fund manager
It applies to the AIF, KMPs, trustees, directors, designated partners, and investment manager

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The Code of Conduct applies broadly — to the AIF itself, key management personnel, trustees/trustee company, directors of the trustee company, designated partners/directors of the fund, investment manager, and KMPs of the investment manager. All must abide by the Code specified in the Fourth Schedule of SEBI (AIF) Regulations. **The Trap:** The Code's broad applicability ensures accountability at every level — not just the fund manager but all associated persons who influence fund decisions. **Cross-Exam Context:** Code of Conduct scope and applicability are tested in XIX-A. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The broad Code of Conduct coverage means multiple individuals are accountable. When evaluating a fund, assess the compliance culture across the organization — not just at the top but also among middle management and operational staff.
